name: Kofax TotalAgility
description: Kofax (Tungsten Automation) — intelligent automation combining RPA, OCR, document intelligence, and process orchestration for back-office workflows.

seo.title: Kofax TotalAgility — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Kofax TotalAgility: Kofax (Tungsten Automation) — intelligent automation combining RPA, OCR, document intelligence, and process orchestration for back-office wo

when_to_use: Intelligent document processing for invoices and contracts at scale
RPA combined with OCR for financial services back-office ops
Process orchestration automating end-to-end enterprise workflows
Capture and extraction from forms and unstructured documents
Attended and unattended bots with document AI in one platform

pros: Document intelligence deeply integrated with RPA
Mature OCR with decades of enterprise tuning
Rebranded under Tungsten with renewed investment
cons: Rebrand confusion from Kofax to Tungsten
Heavy enterprise software with steep pricing
UX dated compared to cloud-first rivals
review.verdict: Premium IDP+RPA stack for document-heavy enterprises; overkill and pricey for most mid-market orgs.
review.best_for: Large enterprises automating document-heavy back-office processes
review.not_for: Dev-first teams or SMBs needing lightweight OCR and automation
